The **2012 [Categoría Primera B](/wiki/Categor%C3%ADa_Primera_B "Categoría Primera B")** season is the 23rd season since its founding and is officially called the **2012 Torneo [Postobón](/wiki/Postob%C3%B3n "Postobón")** for sponsorship reasons.

## Format

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=2012_Categor%C3%ADa_Primera_B_season&action=edit&section=1 "Edit section: Format")]

The season will consist of two tournaments: the 'Torneo Apertura' and the 'Torneo Finalización'. Each tournament will have an identical format of eighteen rounds with a round of regional derbies in the ninth round. At the end of the first eighteen rounds, the eight best-placed team will advance to the Semifinal round where teams will be sorted into groups and play a short double [Round-robin tournament](/wiki/Round-robin_tournament "Round-robin tournament") group stage. The winner of each group will advance to the Final round, which will consist of two legs. The winner will advance to the season final at the end of the Torneo Finalización.

## Promotion/relegation playoff

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=2012_Categor%C3%ADa_Primera_B_season&action=edit&section=22 "Edit section: Promotion/relegation playoff")]

As the second worst team in the relegation table, [Cúcuta Deportivo](/wiki/C%C3%BAcuta_Deportivo "Cúcuta Deportivo") had to play a two-legged tie against [América de Cali](/wiki/Am%C3%A9rica_de_Cali "América de Cali"), the 2012 Categoría Primera B runner-up. As the Primera A team, Cúcuta will play the second leg at home. The winner will be determined by points, followed by goal difference, then a penalty shootout. The winner will be promoted/remain in the Primera A for the 2013 season, while the loser will be relegated/remain in the Primera B.
